description: Sturdy and style go hand-in-hand in this sporty adidas backpack. Ergonomically designed and with the patented 3-Stripes on the front, this bag offers unparalleled comfort.Height: 47cmWidth: 14cmDepth: 33cmMade of 100% polyester with a nylon liningTwo main zippered compartments One main zippered compartment that has inbuilt file holdersOne zippered compartment with a laptop sleeveA zippered compartment on the front with a pouch in the exteriorSynthetic haul loop for handling easeBranded zippers and slidersErgonomic design with a padded backMesh pockets on the sides for carrying a sipper CareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
